about.title: About JM COMPUTERS — 6+ Years of Pune's Premium PC Workshop
about.description: JM COMPUTERS — the story behind Pune
about.html:
Home About

Pune's premium gaming technology partner — for 6+ years.

JM COMPUTERS is a family-run workshop on Tilak Road, Sadashiv Peth, building custom RTX gaming PCs, fixing laptops at the board level, and quietly powering hundreds of Pune homes, studios and offices since 2007.

See our RTX builds Visit the workshop
18+ years in Pune 7,000+ happy clients 500+ custom builds
  Our story

From a small Tilak Road counter to Pune's go-to workshop

JM COMPUTERS opened its doors in 2007 with a single bench, a soldering iron and one stubborn idea — that customers deserve honest diagnostics, genuine parts and builds that look as good as they perform.

Eighteen years later that bench has grown into a full workshop on Tilak Road. We've assembled over 500 custom rigs — from the first college-budget builds to the latest RTX 4080 streaming beasts — and brought back from the dead more laptops than we can count.

What hasn't changed: the same family runs the shop, the same honesty drives every quote, and every system still gets benchmarked, cable-managed and signed off before it leaves the door.

RTX 4070 · Pro Streamer buildWorkshop · 2026
01

6+ Years Experience

Reliable expertise across sales, assembly, upgrades and service diagnostics.

02

Customer-First Advisory

Consultative recommendations based on your workload, games and realistic budget.

03

Genuine Product Policy

Curated component sourcing with compatibility checks and quality confidence.

04

Premium Build Finish

Clean cable management, airflow-tuned assembly and benchmark-verified handover.

  What we stand for

Six principles we don't compromise on

The non-negotiables that have kept Pune's gamers, creators and businesses coming back for 6 years.

Honest diagnosis first

We tell you exactly what's wrong — and what isn't — before we touch a screwdriver. Walk-in checks are always free.

Quote, then work

Nothing happens without a written estimate. Zero surprise bills, zero hidden labour charges.

Genuine parts only

Authorised sourcing from NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ASUS, MSI, Corsair, Samsung and 25+ premium partners.

Realistic ETAs

If we say Friday 5 PM, we mean Friday 5 PM. Live WhatsApp updates the moment your job is ready.

Built for longevity

Airflow-tuned, thermals validated under stress, cable-managed for serviceability — not just for the photo.

Post-sale support

Bring it back any time for re-tuning, dust cleaning or upgrade advice — even years later.

  Our journey

Eighteen years, one Tilak Road address

2007 JM COMPUTERS opens A single counter on Tilak Road, focused on Pentium-era PC assembly, RAM upgrades and Windows installs.
2011 Chip-level repair lab added Board-level diagnostic equipment installed — laptop motherboard repair becomes a signature service.
2015 First custom gaming builds GTX 970 era — we start hand-assembling gaming PCs to order. Word-of-mouth from local esports players takes over.
2018 AMC & networking division launches Annual maintenance contracts for cafés, offices and clinics across Sadashiv Peth and Kothrud.
2022 RTX era · 30 & 40 series builds The "Ultimate 4K Beast" line debuts. Streaming, creator and 4K-gaming rigs become our biggest category.
2026 7,000+ happy clients · 500+ custom rigs Still the same family, still the same Tilak Road shop, still the same workshop ethic.
0+

gamers, creators & businesses.

  How we deliver

JM COMPUTERS Custom PC Process

Transparent, on-camera, no surprises — from advance payment to dispatch.

01

Place the order

You can place the order by paying a 50% advance to lock in your build & component prices.

02

Order confirmed

Once we receive the amount, we begin the sourcing & build-planning process.

03

Parts reserved

The parts are reserved in our Tilak Road workshop and tagged to your build.

04

Sealed-box photos

Sealed product pictures are shared with you to ensure full transparency.

05

Live build slot

A time slot is scheduled for your live PC build via Google Meet.

06

Built & tested

The PC is built live and then sent for in-house stress testing.

07

36-point test report

A 36-point test report is shared with you covering thermals, perf & stability.

08

Final approval

Once you’re satisfied with the testing & looks, the pending amount can be paid.

09

Dispatched

Once full payment is complete, the PC is dispatched / hand-delivered from JM COMPUTERS.

faq.title: FAQ — JM COMPUTERS · Common Questions About Builds, Repair, Warranty & AMC
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about JM COMPUTERS — custom RTX gaming PC builds, laptop repair, SSD/RAM upgrades, warranty, turnaround times, AMC contracts and CCTV services in Pune.
faq.html:
Home FAQ

Honest answers to common questions.

What gamers, creators and businesses usually ask us before walking in — about builds, repairs, warranty, turnaround times and AMC contracts.

Ask on WhatsApp Visit the workshop
20+ answers Live chat 10–8 Honest first answer
  Filter by topic

Browse by category

Tap a category to filter. Tap any question to expand the answer.

Do you build custom RTX gaming PCs in Pune?
Yes. We design, assemble and benchmark RTX gaming PCs with optimised cooling and RGB aesthetics — from the Stealth RTX 4060 build to the Ultimate 4K Beast on RTX 4080. Each rig is cable-managed, stress-tested and benchmark-verified before handover.
How long does a custom build take?
Typically 3–7 working days, depending on part availability. You'll get a written timeline when you confirm the spec, plus WhatsApp updates as components arrive and assembly begins.
Can I upgrade SSD, RAM or GPU on my existing PC?
Absolutely. We run compatibility checks (PSU headroom, motherboard PCIe, socket and BIOS) and install upgrades with performance tuning and a clean data migration where needed.
Do you offer laptop chip-level repair?
Yes. We provide board-level diagnostics and repair for major laptop brands — ASUS, Dell, HP, Lenovo, Acer, MSI and Apple. BGA reflow, SMD replacement and dead-board recovery handled in-house.
My laptop won't turn on. Is it dead?
Usually not. "Won't power on" is often a charging IC, capacitor, or shorted rail — all repairable at the board level. Walk in for a free diagnostic; we'll tell you the truth either way.
How long does a typical repair take?
Most upgrades (RAM, SSD, OS) are done same-day in under 4 hours. Standard repairs: 24–48 hours. Board-level chip work: 3–5 days. Custom builds: 3–7 days. We always commit to a written ETA up front.
Can you recover data from a dead hard drive or SSD?
In most cases yes. We attempt recovery from failed drives, dead SSDs and corrupted partitions. Initial scan is free — we'll give a written estimate before any chargeable recovery work begins.
Do you provide warranty on builds & repairs?
Yes. New components come with full manufacturer warranty (typically 1–3 years). Our assembly and repair work carries a service warranty — we'll fix any workmanship issue free for the warranty period.
Are the parts you use genuine?
100% genuine, sourced from authorised partners — NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ASUS, MSI, Corsair, Samsung, Seagate and 25+ brand partners. We do not use refurbished or grey-market components for new builds.
Will an SSD upgrade really speed up my old laptop?
Yes — usually dramatically. A modern NVMe SSD turns boot times from a minute to ~10 seconds and makes any 5+ year-old machine feel new. Combined with a RAM bump it's the highest-impact upgrade you can do.
How much RAM do I really need?
For light office & college work: 16 GB DDR4/5. For gaming + browsing: 32 GB DDR5. For 4K creator workflows (Premiere, Blender, DaVinci) or many Chrome tabs: 64 GB DDR5. We'll match it to your real workload.
What does Annual Maintenance (AMC) include?
Preventive servicing on all covered devices, priority response, multi-device fix scheduling, network & security alignment, CCTV install/support and a same-day repair SLA on critical issues. Tailored to office, café, clinic or co-working setups.
Do you do CCTV install & networking?
Yes — multi-camera CCTV setup with NVR/DVR config, remote-view setup, structured cabling, Wi-Fi mesh, switch & AP install, POS networking and printer setup for shops, cafés, clinics and offices.
Where is JM COMPUTERS located?
Shop no 10, EIFFEL SQUARE, Tilak Rd, Perugate, Sadashiv Peth, Pune — 411030. Easy to find — just opposite the Perugate landmark. Visit the Contact page for a live map.
What are your store hours?
Mon – Sun: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM. WhatsApp us anytime on +91 83083 10019 for quick queries — we usually reply within minutes during open hours.
Is parking available near the store?
Yes. Two-wheeler parking is available right in front, and four-wheeler parking is available along Tilak Road and in nearby side-lane parking pockets.
Do I need to book an appointment?
No. Walk-ins are welcome any time during store hours. For complex repairs or custom build consultations, a quick WhatsApp or call ahead helps us be ready for you.
If my repair doesn't fix the issue, what then?
We diagnose-and-quote before any work. If the original quoted repair doesn't resolve the issue, we'll re-investigate at no additional labour cost. Parts are only charged once you've approved the new plan.
Can you ship a built PC outside Pune?
Yes — we ship pan-India with insured courier and bespoke shock-resistant packaging for custom builds. Walk-in pickup remains the most common option for Pune-based customers.
How do I request an AMC quote for my office?
WhatsApp us your team size, device count (laptops + desktops + CCTV/network gear) and your typical workload. We'll send a written AMC proposal within one working day, with a no-obligation review meeting if needed.

Still need help? WhatsApp us or call +91 83083 10019 — 10 AM – 8 PM, Mon–Sun.

  Common questions

Frequently asked questions

Quick answers to what gamers, creators and businesses ask us most often before walking in.

Do you build custom RTX gaming PCs in Pune?
Yes. We design, assemble and benchmark RTX gaming PCs with optimised cooling and RGB aesthetics — from the Stealth RTX 4060 to the Ultimate 4K Beast on RTX 4080.
Can I upgrade SSD, RAM or GPU on my existing PC?
Absolutely. We run compatibility checks and install upgrades with performance tuning and a clean data migration.
Do you offer laptop chip-level repair?
Yes. We provide board-level diagnostics and repair for major laptop brands — ASUS, Dell, HP, Lenovo, Acer and Apple.
Where is JM COMPUTERS located?
Shop no 10, EIFFEL SQUARE, Tilak Rd, Perugate, Sadashiv Peth, Pune — 411030.
What are your store hours?
Mon – Sun: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM. WhatsApp us anytime on +91 83083 10019 for quick queries.

Want the full list? Browse all FAQs or WhatsApp us.

  What's covered

Every service we offer, on one page

Eight specialised service tracks across hardware, software, network and infrastructure.

Chip-level repair

Board-level diagnostics & repair for ASUS, Dell, HP, Lenovo, Acer, Apple laptops & desktops.

SSD & RAM upgrades

NVMe and DDR5 upgrades with compatibility checks, clean data migration and performance validation.

Custom PC builds

Component-by-component custom RTX gaming rigs, creator workstations and dual-PC streaming setups.

Data recovery

Recovery from failed drives, dead SSDs and corrupted partitions — including emergency same-day service.

CCTV install & service

Multi-camera CCTV setup, NVR/DVR config, remote-view setup and cable routing for shops & homes.

Networking

Office LAN, Wi-Fi mesh, switch + AP install, POS & printer networking and structured cabling.

OS & software install

Genuine Windows install, driver tuning, dual-boot, software setup and license activation support.

Annual maintenance (AMC)

Preventive servicing contracts for offices, cafés, clinics, co-working & education spaces.

process.title: Our Repair Process — JM COMPUTERS · Honest Diagnosis, Written ETAs, Zero Surprises
process.description: The four-step JM COMPUTERS repair process — intake, diagnosis, repair, QA handover. Honest written quotes, board-level expertise and live WhatsApp updates the moment your device is ready.
process.html:
Home Process

Four steps. Zero surprises.

Every device that walks through our door — laptop, gaming rig, office workstation or CCTV setup — follows the same honest, structured workflow. You always know what's being done, why, and what it costs.

Drop off your device Call ahead
Free walk-in diagnosis Quote before any work Live WhatsApp updates
  The 4-step workflow

From intake to handover

Each step has a written outcome and a clear next action — no guesswork, no scope creep, no surprises.

01

Device Intake

Detailed symptom logging and use-case capture so we know exactly what to look for.

02

Technical Diagnosis

Electrical, thermal and storage evaluation — board-level if needed. Quote before any work starts.

03

Repair Execution

Precision replacement and repair with firmware and software tuning by the JM service team.

04

QA Handover

Validation checklist with care recommendations — and WhatsApp updates the moment it's ready.

  What happens at each step

The checklist every device gets

Twenty individual checkpoints across four steps — applied consistently to every laptop, desktop and gaming rig we touch.

01

Device intake & symptom capture

A trained technician records the device, your use case and the exact failure pattern — when it started, what triggers it, and what you've already tried.

  • Physical inspection & photo record
  • Serial number + warranty status logged
  • Backup status check before any work
  • Customer expectation written into job sheet
  • Tag number issued for WhatsApp tracking
02

Multi-layer technical diagnosis

Electrical, thermal, storage and software layers checked in sequence. If a board-level issue is suspected, the unit goes to our chip-level lab.

  • Power-rail voltage & current draw test
  • Thermal imaging on CPU/GPU/VRMs
  • NVMe/SSD SMART + bad-sector scan
  • RAM stress test (MemTest86)
  • Written quote with parts + labour breakdown
03

Precision repair & component-level work

Replacements use only genuine, sourced-from-partner parts. Where a board-level fix is possible, we do it instead of pushing a costly replacement.

  • Board-level resoldering on BGA/SMD chips
  • Genuine OEM part replacement
  • Thermal paste & airflow re-tune
  • Firmware & driver update sweep
  • Cable management & dust deep-clean
04

QA validation & handover

The device runs through a stress & reliability checklist before we call you. Handover comes with care notes so you know how to keep it that way.

  • 30-min sustained stress test
  • Boot & sleep/wake reliability check
  • Benchmark sheet attached (for gaming rigs)
  • Care & cleaning recommendations
  • WhatsApp + call notification "ready for pickup"
  Our turnaround promise

Realistic ETAs you can plan around

We won't promise miracles. We'll promise the truth — and then deliver it.

Same-day · most upgrades

RAM, SSD, GPU swaps, OS reinstall, virus cleanup, thermal repaste — typically in < 4 hours.

24–48h · most repairs

Standard laptop & desktop repairs with available parts — usually back to you within 2 working days.

3–5 days · board-level

Chip-level motherboard repairs and BGA reflow work — handled in our specialised lab.

3–7 days · custom builds

Complete RTX gaming PC builds — including parts sourcing, assembly, benchmarking & cable management.

1–2 days · CCTV setup

Multi-camera CCTV installation with NVR setup and remote-view configuration for shops & homes.

2–10 days · data recovery

Depends on drive condition and recovery complexity — written estimate after initial scan.

  Ready to start?

Upgraded SSD and 32 GB RAM on my old laptop — Premiere Pro feels like a brand-new machine. Done in under 2 hours.

Aditi M.Video Creator

Stable 360 FPS in Valorant, RGB looks insane, and the team explained every component before assembly. Top tier.

Saurabh P.Esports Player

Nikita K.Business Owner

Student budget build for college — they helped me pick parts that fit my fees, not their margin. Honest shop.

Aakash V.Engineering Student

SketchUp and Revit are buttery smooth on the workstation they built for our studio. Quiet under full load too.

Priya S.Architect

Blender renders that took 40 minutes now finish in 12. The RTX 4070 build is unreal for 3D work.

Manoj T.3D Artist

My Twitch stream finally runs 1080p60 without dropped frames. Their dual-PC setup advice was spot on.

Tanvi R.Twitch Streamer

Liquid cooled my old i9 and it idles 20°C cooler. RGB is perfectly synced with my monitor too.

Vikrant J.Tech Enthusiast

Recovered my entire wedding photo archive from a dead drive. Saved my career, honestly. Forever grateful.

Sneha B.Photo Editor

Studio PC is silent and powerful — handles 80-track Ableton sessions without a single click or pop.
